stocks.impact_theory: Iran conflict escalates, halting Persian Gulf shipping and spiking oil prices to $90+ WTI. Economic implications: higher input costs fuel inflation, stagflation risks with weak 92k jobs loss. Market psych: risk-off rotation to energy. Historical: 1979 Iranian Revolution oil shock doubled prices. Analogies: like a dam bursting flooding energy sector; poker player bluffing with aces in oil hand.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web news and X posts show oil surge driving energy gains amid broad market selloff; X sentiment positive on $XOM with mentions of sustained rally.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 8-12% gains on prolonged tensions; target $135.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid short; de-escalation could cap at +2%.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Quick resolution to conflict drops oil 10-20%; recession curbs demand.

stocks.justification: Strong consensus across news/X on oil impact; historical precedents reliable.

stocks.impact_theory: Same Iran-driven oil spike benefits majors; implications: margin expansion but capex caution. Psych: safe haven in volatility. Parallels: 1990 Gulf War +30% oil. Analogies: rising tide lifting all oil boats; snowball effect from geopolitics.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Reports highlight CVX gains >1% amid oil rally; X buzz on energy rotation.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Oil supply waivers (e.g., Russia/India) ease prices; demand destruction.

stocks.justification: Direct tie to oil prices confirmed in multiple sources.

stocks.impact_theory: Pure-play E&P benefits most from price surge; econ: higher revenues offset weak jobs. Psych: momentum play. Historical: 2022 Ukraine oil boom. Analogies: rocket fuel for shale; domino tipping energy upside.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket gainer +2.8%; X/news link to oil surge.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Leveraged balance sheet vulnerable to oil pullback.

stocks.justification: Strong but more volatile than integrateds.

stocks.impact_theory: Nuclear/power demand rises as oil alternative for AI/data centers amid surge. Econ: hedges inflation. Psych: AI energy play. Parallels: post-Fukushima nuclear shift. Analogies: lighthouse in oil storm; backup generator kicking in.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X posts highlight VST/TLN for AI power in oil crisis.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Oil de-escalation reduces urgency; regulatory hurdles.

stocks.impact_theory: Higher jet fuel from oil spike squeezes margins; econ: cuts demand/travel. Psych: risk-off travel. Historical: 2008 oil to $147 crushed airlines. Analogies: anchor dragging airline profits; fuel fire burning cash.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Oil surge hits airlines hard per news; broad market down, X implies rotation out.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Fuel hedging protects short-term; demand rebound.

stocks.justification: Clear logical link to oil costs, historical proof.
